overview: Cumulative is a behavioral-science-driven social accountability PWA with a premium Neumorphic design, dual-swipe habit check-ins, a Done tab with undo, 7-day color ball week calendars per habit, and midnight finalization following user local timezone.
features: Done tab with undo popup and satisfying slide-back animation
7-day color ball week calendar on each habit card
Swipe hint only visible when un-swiped habits remain
Midnight finalization in user's local timezone
True Neumorphic design (light and dark themes)
